promptTemplate: A portrait of a person with {{head_shape}} head shape, {{skin_tone}} skin, {{eye_color}} eyes, {{hair_style}} {{hair_color}} hair, {{nose_shape}} nose, and {{mouth_shape}} mouth

tags.label: Face Generator — p5.js Portrait Sketch
tags.description: Generative portrait sketch with subtle animation: micro breathing, gentle body sway, per-strand hair movement (long/wavy/curly), blink cycle every ~4s, and mouse-tracking pupils. Nose shapes all have proper nostrils. Mouth uses two-arc lip construction. API updated to p.getSynthVar().
